description:
About this item
Maximize Corner Space: Featuring L-shaped design to perfectly fit the wall, maximizes the value of the corner for you and increases the space utilization; adding a touch of freshness and sophistication to your home decor
Anti-Falling Baffle Design: Equipped with the intimate panels on the sides, which can reinforce the corner shelf while preventing items from falling, and allowing to store things more safer and cleaner. Overall size: 23.62"L x 23.62"W x 64.96"H
Modern & Multifunctional Bookcase: The 90° right-angle design and modern open shelves build a kind of fashion simple style. It has 6 tiers storage shelf to hold books, photos, knick-knacks, etc; which helps keep daily items organized. Say goodbye to chaos
Premium Material: Made of white particle board to ensure the corner bookshelf’s stability and durability, each display shelf can hold up to 60 lb. This free-standing storage rack is a great addition to living room, bedroom, hallway and office etc
